title: Treat Now, Pay Later
intro: We believe wellness should be within reach. Through our partner Cherry, you can break your treatment into easy monthly payments.
benefits: Interest-bearing plans with APRs as low as 5.99%
disclaimer: Financing is provided by Cherry Technologies, Inc. Payment options through Cherry are subject to an eligibility check and are provided by these lending partners: cherry.com/lending-partners. Rates range from 0–35.99% APR. For example, a $1,200 purchase could cost $104.13 per month over 12 months at 15% APR. Down payment may be required.
